notes: Piracy mandates honor your letter of marque. A 🏴 Prey on shipping mandate no longer raises your Wanted if you hold a letter of marque against the target system's faction — it's sanctioned privateering (the faction still resents the losses). Raiding a faction you have no marque against (or with a marque against a different faction) still piles on Wanted as before. The commission form spells out which case applies.
